label.name: Name
label.enableHaDiscoveryTip: Emit MQTT Discovery payload on connect

mcz-in.help:
Read node for MCZ stoves. Receives real-time state from the cloud.

Settings

  • Configuration: The configuration node representing your stove.

Output 1 — Telemetry

  • msg.topic: mcz/SERIALNUMBER
  • msg.payload: Parsed structured data (temperatures, fan states, etc.).
  • msg.raw (optional): Raw pipe-separated string from the MCZ cloud.
  • On connect with HA Discovery enabled: emits the MQTT Auto-Discovery config payload.

Output 2 — Events

System events: connect, disconnect, error, reconnecting.

  • msg.topic: mcz/SERIALNUMBER/event
  • msg.payload.event: event type string.

Input

Send strings in msg.payload to control the connection:

  • "connect": Connects the socket to the stove
  • "disconnect": Disconnects the socket
  • "get": Requests an immediate update (useful when auto-polling is 0)
